title: notholaena candida
intro: Notholaena candida, also known as the silver fern lily, is a species of fern native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and saponins. The medicinal properties of Notholaena candida have been shown to promote wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, making it a valuable herb for treating various health conditions. Herbal preparations of Notholaena candida can be made into teas, infusions, or salves, and can be used externally to soothe skin irritations and internally to support digestive health.
